reviews.review_description: Not much to it… should be free.
There is a lot of game here for $5.  Super fun with friends, glad I bought it!

I'm really disappointed in this game.  The matchmaking works, the environments look good, but the actual game mechanics are bugged.  +2's work intermittently and people are able to spam the uno button to eat through the deck.  I had really high hopes for this game and gifted it to several friends.  I hope there are updates and get this playable.  The bones are there, but inconsistent card playing makes this unusable.

reviews.review_title: Excited to have a card game
reviews.review_description: I just bought this app. I was practically begging someone to make a card game I could play with my friends and family across the states. I hope they put more games into this app . Love the platform,  I love that we can add more players just by adding robots. I had so much fun with my nephew and hope to add more friends and family. Thank you for putting more than 4 players to this game. I'm excited to see what new things this game has! So, when are you going to add more card games? Hopefully you can change the scenery to other different places.
So me and my friends were looking to find a fun vr group game to play and we found this game and it is amazing! It’s so fun! We had a blast! Can’t recommend this game enough!
Slick! Plays smoothly and well-priced. The bots are fun and let you play either 1player or while waiting for friends.
I don't have many friends with VR, but I was able to play with some cute robots. Love the house rule customizations especially the +25 Wild!
